zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

specs_authored.scenario: Canonical demo path: login (acme-ria) → dashboard (Doe Family only) → household detail (4 persons, 1 trust, 5 assets, $20M, OBBBA tax baseline showing taxable $5M and federal estate tax $2M with RULE-FET-OBBBA-2026 stamp) → scenario page → run GRAT-vs-do-nothing with default form values → assert positive tax savings + educational disclaimer note
asserts: Brand-substitution: 'EstateCompass' present, no wealth.com registered marks (HD-002)
OBBBA constants surfaced in UI ($15M exemption, $2M federal estate tax for $20M household — matches Slice-5 golden cases)
Educational projection note visible on scenario page (HD-007 UPL discipline)
Cross-tenant: Bedrock household NOT visible to acme-ria advisor

specs_authored.scenario: ARC-005 §2.2 T-HH-1/2/3 attack: Bedrock advisor logs in, attempts (a) dashboard listing — sees only Bedrock's seed; (b) direct URL guess to Acme's Doe Family ID — backend returns 404, UI shows not-found state, no Doe Family content surfaces.
asserts: Bedrock dashboard does NOT show Doe Family
Direct URL /households/<acme-id> returns 404 (not 403; existence not leaked)
No leakage of John/Jane/Sam/Sara Doe names in DOM

specs_authored.scenario: FR-UI-DISCLAIMER-001 + HD-002 brand substitution checks across all routes: login, dashboard, household detail, scenario.
asserts: Disclaimer text contains 'educational' + 'not a law firm'
5 forbidden wealth.com marks (Ester, Family Office Suite, EstateFlow, Heritage Map, Plan for Every Tomorrow) absent from page HTML
Footer reaffirms 'Synthetic data only' + 'Not legal or tax advice'

config_authored: runs/wealth-com/app/apps/web/playwright.config.ts (3 projects: chromium-desktop, webkit-desktop, chromium-mobile/Pixel 5; trace+screenshot+video on failure; webServer auto-start unless E2E_NO_AUTOSTART=1)

blocking_dependencies: docker compose up — Postgres + api + ai-extract + calc-engine + web all running
Playwright browsers installed: pnpm exec playwright install chromium webkit
execution_state.rationale_for_authoring_without_executio: Per VNV-001 §3 'specs authored pending live execution' is an explicit interim state for ui_surface tests when the local stack is not running. The specs are themselves valuable: they document the canonical demo path in executable form, encode all cross-cutting concerns (FR-UI-DISCLAIMER-001 + HD-002 + HD-007 + HD-008 + ADR-002 cross-tenant), and produce concrete pass/fail signals the moment the stack is up. Authoring + executing are two separate beads; this record discharges the authoring bead.

what_passes_at_authoring_time: Specs compile (TypeScript strict + Playwright API types)
Spec file paths match playwright.config.ts testDir
Selector strategy uses semantic locators (getByRole/getByLabel) not brittle CSS
FORBIDDEN_MARKS regex set in disclaimer-and-brand.spec.ts mirrors DDD-001 §forbidden-terms
what_pending_live_execution: Actual Playwright run output: pass/fail per project (chromium-desktop, webkit-desktop, chromium-mobile)
OBBBA-specific UI text assertion outcome ($15M exemption, $2M tax)
next_action: Run `cd runs/wealth-com/app && docker compose up --build` followed by `pnpm -F @estatecompass/web e2e` and append the run output (pass/fail counts + duration + per-spec result) to this record under field `execution_state.executed_at` + `executed_results`. The cron loop or a future construction bead can pick this up.
